steps.title: Trace the causal chain
steps.content: The phrase “in turn” signals a consequence—it points forward from Clements' warning about biased analysis to show what such bias produces.

steps.title: Match the consequence
steps.content: Choice B correctly identifies the function: the sentence elaborates on a specific consequence (exaggerated reports) that flows from the small sample size problem. The alternatives misidentify the function—A sees a shift in understanding, C wrongly emphasizes rather than undermines Faleiro's claim, and D treats this as countering Clements rather than supporting their concern. That matches choice B — B is correct.
